commands.repair_reason: Manual maintainer review is needed because the remaining decision is compatibility/security scope and product ownership, not a narrow automated repair.; Needs attention: The diff introduces concrete security-boundary concerns in shared guarded fetch and the new Telegram context export command.; Review finding: [P1] Keep URL recovery out of guarded fetch — src/infra/net/fetch-guard.ts:174 - [P1] Remove the bundled pr... (sha=f71fbd6dd1aaee2ef2aea08f57dd7dd21f35998c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds sentinel-token sanitization to bash exec, web-fetch/fetch guard, file/search tool arguments, adds generic repeat tool-loop blocking, and adds a bundled portable-context Telegram command.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level failure shape: current main forwards exec commands raw and validates web_fetch with `new URL(params.url)`, so sentinel-prefixed args fail before useful output. I did not run a live Gemma or Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual maintainer review is needed because the remaining decision is compatibility/security scope and product ownership, not a narrow automated repair.
